category_sources: Official homepage https://fping.org/ describes fping as an ICMP echo probe tool for network hosts.
source_facts.description says it is a scriptable ping program for checking multiple hosts.
docs_sources: Official homepage support section links to documentation at the fping(8) man page.
repo_sources: GitHub repository README identifies the project as fping and links back to fping.org.
source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage links to GitHub for latest sources.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes ICMP echo probes and multiple-host network diagnostics.
